description_long: This is a modern, modular corner chair upholstered in a rich, burnt orange fabric. The chair features a boxy, geometric design with a thick, cushioned seat and backrest, as well as a single armrest on one side, forming an L-shape. The upholstery appears smooth and tightly fitted, giving the chair a sleek and contemporary appearance. The base is low and solid, with no visible legs, suggesting a sturdy construction. The chair is designed for comfort and style, making it suitable for urban lounges, waiting areas, or public parks. Its bold color and minimalist form make it a striking accent piece in any urban environment.
description: A modern, burnt orange corner chair with a boxy, cushioned design and a single armrest, upholstered in smooth fabric. Its minimalist, sturdy form is ideal for stylish urban settings.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the L-shaped armrest and backrest, with the seat cushion clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat and the single armrest on the right side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid, rectangular profile and the armrest extending from the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain, unadorned side of the chair without the armrest.
